zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Seager於1604年出生在英國多瑟特多爾斯特時，她的父親Richard Seager45歲，母親Mrs Richard Seager25歲。她於大約1617年與John Eames在英國英格蘭多瑟特福丁頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1665年5月11日在英國英格蘭多瑟特多爾斯特享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Seager于1604年出生在英国多瑟特多爾斯特时，她的父亲Richard Seager45岁，母亲Mrs Richard Seager25岁。她于大约1617年与John Eames在英国英格兰多瑟特福丁頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1665年5月11日在英国英格兰多瑟特多爾斯特享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Seager
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Segar, Segor, Sagar (Old English Sǣgār, from sǣ ‘sea’ + gār ‘spear’). Variants of its medieval forms may sometimes have been identical with those of Sigger (see Seago ), leading to confusion of the two names.

variants.name: Seago
meanings: variant of   Seager   with an altered pronunciation of the final syllable.

variant of Sigger, from the Middle English personal names Sigar, Siger, and Sigher, from either Old English Sigegār, ancient Germanic Sigger, or Old Norse Sigarr, Old Danish and Swedish Sighar. In each case the name arises from roots meaning ‘victory’ + ‘spear’. In medieval Norfolk the source of the name was probably mostly Scandinavian. Middle English Seger, Segor may have been variants, leading to confusion with Seager .

variants.name: Segars
meanings: Variant of   Seager   or, possibly,   Seegers  .

variants.name: Siggers
meanings: English (Essex and London): patronymic, with post-medieval excrescent -s, from the Middle English personal names Sigar, Siger, and Sigher, either from Old English Sigegār, ancient Germanic Sigger, or Old Norse Sigarr, Old Danish and Swedish Sighar, in each case from roots meaning ‘victory’ + ‘spear’. Middle English Seger, Segor may have been variants, leading to confusion with Seager , from Old English Sǣgār, in which the first element is sǣ ‘sea’. Compare Seago .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Seager was born in 1604, in Dorchester, Dorset, England, her father, Richard Seager, was 45 and her mother, Mrs Richard Seager, was 25. She married John Eames about 1617, in Fordington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 May 1665, in Dorchester, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Seager est née en 1604, à Dorchester, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Seager, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard Seager, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Eames environ 1617, à Fordington, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 mai 1665, à Dorchester, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Seager 1604 in Dorchester, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Seager 45 und ihre Mutter Mrs Richard Seager 25. Sie hat um 1617 in Fordington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom John Eames geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. Mai 1665 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Dorchester, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Seager è nata il nel 1604 nel Dorchester, Dorset, England, sua padre, Richard Seager, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Mrs Richard Seager, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Eames circa 1617, nel Fordington, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 maggio 1665, nel Dorchester, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Seagerが1604年にイギリスドールセトドールチェスターで生まれた時，父Richard Seagerは45歳，母Mrs Richard Seagerは25歳であった。約1617年にイギリスイギリスドールセトフォーディントンでJohn Eamesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1665年5月11日にイギリスイギリスドールセトドールチェスターで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Seager(이)가 1604년 영국 도르세트 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Seager(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Richard Seager(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1617년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포딩턴에서 John Eames(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1665년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 도르체스터에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Seager nasceu em 1604, em Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Seager, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Richard Seager, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Eames aproximadamente 1617, em Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de maio de 1665, em Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Seager родилась в 1604 г. в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Seager было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard Seager, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Eames около 1617 г. в местности фордингтон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 мая 1665 г. в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Seager nació en 1604, en Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Seager, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mrs Richard Seager, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Eames aproximadamente 1617, en Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1665, en Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
